candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure the floor before trusting any incubator play, venture lane, or agentic workflow thesis.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Without a concrete venture model, distribution engine, trust model, and validation motion, the incubator should not pretend it has compounding leverage.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Agentic founder backoffice SaaS with operator-content distribution, template factory delivery, paid pilots, and audit-trail trust.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Founder backoffice tooling can compound when distribution, reusable templates, and trust visibility reinforce each other.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Service-to-software play for agency operators using design-partner distribution, agent workflows, and concierge validation with manual review.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Agency operators pay faster when workflow pain is already visible and the incubator can bridge concierge delivery into reusable software.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Internal incubator OS spinout using portfolio cross-sell, internal-tools-first build stack, dogfood validation, and audit-trail trust.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: An incubator can turn its own operating stack into a compounding asset when dogfood creates real leverage before externalization.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Media-to-tools play for creators using operator-content distribution, template factory build stack, presell validation, and self-serve low-risk onboarding.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Audience-first startup tooling can launch quickly, but only if the toolchain actually compounds into reusable assets rather than one-off content spikes.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure the current incubator operating loop before trusting any automation policy.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: The incubator needs a control-plane baseline before it should trust tighter ops mutations or autoloop policy changes.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Three-lane portfolio, weekly review cadence, template-first build routing, and every-review knowledge capture.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: A narrow active portfolio with explicit review, validation, and doctrine capture loops should make the incubator more self-running.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Two active ventures, manual admissions gate, and strict trust review for sensitive startup operations.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: A tighter portfolio and stronger trust gate should improve control when the operator system is still rebuilding.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Validation-first operating mode with weekly review, agent workflows, and capital turned off until customer proof is stronger.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: The incubator should optimize for paid validation and weekly review pressure before widening investor choreography.

self_edit.prompt_preamble: Keep the incubator chip honest about solo-operator constraints, agentic leverage, real-world validation, and resilience after operational failure.
